text:
Meet Fred. Fred lives on Maple Street. Fred loves talking about birds.

On weekends, Fred meets Sally. Sally loves birds too. Every weekend they go bird watching. They spot a Mourning dove.

One day, Sally notices owl feathers. Fred thinks it might be owl poop.

A week later, Fred says he sees owl nests.

One sunny day, they hear owl screams. They spot an owl. Fred says he thinks it's older.

SALLY: Look!

Fred stares.

That night, they hear owl hoots. Bye!

They find owl pellets. Bones and stuff. Fred eats them.

Years pass. They see owl chicks.

Fred teaches chicks silly dances.

Friends forever.

Fred is happy. Owl too.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
